product.applications: Natural gas drying, air dehydration, oxygen PSA, insulation air
product.specs: Aperture 4Å; strong adsorption capacity; stable bead structure
product.overview: A general-purpose adsorbent for dehydration and removal of polar contaminants in gas and liquid systems.
product.technicalNotes: Commonly selected where moisture removal and selective adsorption are needed without heavy chemical exposure.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Suitable for process drying where a proven industrial-grade 4A sieve is required.
